nodes.formula:
{v}_{\alpha,\mathbf{q},
u} =  rac{\sum_{\substack{1 \leq j \leq 3 N\1 \leq i \leq 3 N}} \overline{{e}_{i,\mathbf{q},
u}} {\partial D/\partial q}_{i,j,\alpha,\mathbf{q}} {e}_{j,\mathbf{q},
u}}{2 {\omega}_{\mathbf{q},
u}}

nodes.formula:
{\Gamma}_{\mathbf{q},
u} =  rac{\pi \sum_{\substack{1 \leq \mathbf{q'} \leq N_{q}\1 \leq 
u' \leq 3 N\1 \leq 
u'' \leq 3 N}} \left(\left(- 2 n_{BE}{\left( rac{ ar{\h} {\omega}_{- \mathbf{q'} + \mathbf{q},
u''}}{T k_{B}} ight)} + 2 n_{BE}{\left( rac{ ar{\h} {\omega}_{\mathbf{q'},
u'}}{T k_{B}} ight)}ight) \delta{\left(- {\omega}_{- \mathbf{q'} + \mathbf{q},
u''} + {\omega}_{\mathbf{q'},
u'} + {\omega}_{\mathbf{q},
u} ight)} + \left(n_{BE}{\left( rac{ ar{\h} {\omega}_{- \mathbf{q'} + \mathbf{q},

u'}}{T k_{B}} ight)} + 1ight) \delta{\left(- {\omega}_{- \mathbf{q'} + \mathbf{q},
u''} - {\omega}_{\mathbf{q'},
u'} + {\omega}_{\mathbf{q},
u} ight)}ight) \operatorname{|V}^{2}_{3|}{\left(\mathbf{q},
u,\mathbf{q'},
u',- \mathbf{q'} + \mathbf{q},
u'' ight)}}{N  ar{\h}^{2}}

nodes.formula: {Cv}_{\tau} = \frac{\sum_{\substack{1 \leq \alpha \leq 3\\1 \leq i \leq N_{atoms}\\1 \leq t \leq n_{lag}}} {v}_{i,\alpha,\tau + t} {v}_{i,\alpha,t}}{N_{atoms} n_{lag}}

formulas.latex: {Cv}_{\tau} = \frac{\sum_{\substack{1 \leq \alpha \leq 3\\1 \leq i \leq N_{atoms}\\1 \leq t \leq n_{lag}}} {v}_{i,\alpha,\tau + t} {v}_{i,\alpha,t}}{N_{atoms} n_{lag}}

nodes.formula: {M}_{\tau} = \frac{\sum_{\substack{1 \leq \alpha \leq 3\\1 \leq i \leq N_{atoms}\\1 \leq t \leq n_{lag}}} \left({r}_{i,\alpha,\tau + t} - {r}_{i,\alpha,t}\right)^{2}}{N_{atoms} n_{lag}}

formulas.latex: {M}_{\tau} = \frac{\sum_{\substack{1 \leq \alpha \leq 3\\1 \leq i \leq N_{atoms}\\1 \leq t \leq n_{lag}}} \left({r}_{i,\alpha,\tau + t} - {r}_{i,\alpha,t}\right)^{2}}{N_{atoms} n_{lag}}

tiers.name: Sources
tiers.description: Inputs a calculation is given: the potential, temperature, force constants, and polar-response tensors.

tiers.name: Harmonic
tiers.description: The harmonic phonon picture: dynamical matrix, frequencies, eigenvectors, group velocities, density of states.

tiers.name: Thermodynamics
tiers.description: Equilibrium thermodynamics of the phonon gas: heat capacity, entropy, free energy, and their molar forms.

tiers.name: Scattering
tiers.description: Phonon lifetimes: anharmonic, isotope, and boundary linewidth channels, phase space, and Gruneisen anharmonicity.

tiers.name: Transport
tiers.description: Thermal conductivity from the Boltzmann transport equation, the Wigner and QHGK models, and cumulative-kappa distributions.

tiers.name: Molecular dynamics
tiers.description: Direct MD: trajectories, heat current, correlation functions, and the Green-Kubo / NEMD / HNEMD conductivities.

tiers.name: Ground state
tiers.description: First-principles ground state: the total energy, forces, and stress a DFT engine computes for a structure under a chosen potential.

tiers.name: Mechanics
tiers.description: Continuum mechanical response: the elastic tensor, its isotropic moduli, and the pressure.

tiers.name: Stability
tiers.description: Phase stability and electrochemistry: formation energies, distance to the convex hull, surface energetics, and intercalation voltages.

tiers.name: Thermochemistry
tiers.description: Assessed phase thermodynamics: Gibbs energies, chemical potentials, phase fractions, and transition temperatures from CALPHAD databases.

tiers.name: Electronic transport
tiers.description: Carrier transport from ab-initio scattering: electronic conductivity, Seebeck, electronic thermal conductivity, and mobility.

tiers.name: Diffusion
tiers.description: Mass transport from MD: self-diffusivity via the Einstein relation and the Arrhenius activation energy.
